_comment: https://github.com/rolldown/rolldown/issues/10020 — under preserveModules, a default-imported JSON module must NOT emit a named export per top-level key. The per-key bindings are folded into the self-contained default object by `try_inline_json_module_prop`, so `export { Abel, aBeeZee, data_default as default }` referenced non-existent bindings and Node's ESM linker threw `Export 'Abel' is not defined in module`. Regression from #9934 (preserveModules emits the complete declared interface). `dist/data.js` should emit only `export { data_default as default }`; `_test.mjs` confirms the entry links and the default import still works.
